description: You are an Information Security Engineer at a SaaS company. A recent penetration test on the flagship 'securenotes' Express.js application has yielded 6 critical and high-severity findings. The application source code is located at /home/ga/workspace/securenotes/ and the penetration test report is available at /home/ga/workspace/securenotes/pentest_report.md. Remediate all 6 vulnerabilities identified in the report while maintaining the application's functionality.
